_meta.notes: Controls conviction scoring (5-component weighted blend), alternatives discovery, and rotation pair detection. Same conviction scale applies to Buy and Sell — 0.85 means 'high confidence' regardless of direction.

weights._doc: Sum must equal 1.0. Default 0.50 / 0.50 split between technical evidence (signal + metrics) and contextual fit (macro + thesis + universe).

weight_validation._doc: Halt with config error if weights sum drifts beyond tolerance — catches typos when tuning.

metrics_quality_components._sharpe_12w_normalization_max_doc: sharpe_12w is normalized to [0, 1] by clamping to [0, 5] then dividing. Values above 5 are usually noise; bond funds with low vol can exceed but get capped.
metrics_quality_components._drawdown_penalty_threshold_pct_doc: Funds with current_drawdown_pct worse than -3% lose conviction in the metrics-quality term, even if Sharpe is positive.
metrics_quality_components._vol_penalty_min_pct_doc: Funds with ann_volatility_12w_pct above 25% lose some conviction (high vol erodes risk-adjusted attractiveness).

alternatives._doc: For each Buy candidate, find up to 3 peer funds in the same metadata.category. Differentiator text is generated by the LLM portion of this hybrid agent.

rotation_pairing._doc: Pair an Exit with an Entry when both share matched_theme_id from MacroAligner. Letter suffix (a, b, c…) starts with the rotation that has the most paired funds.

tie_break._doc: When two funds tie on conviction within the same recommendation type, prefer the cheaper one, then break by ISIN alphabetically.

_universe_rank_within_doc: Ranks are scoped per recommendation type. So 'rank 1 of 3 BuySignals' is independent of the SellSignal ranking.
